How It Works
Ape.Store prevents rugs by making sure that all created tokens are safe. Each token on Ape.Store is a fair-launch with no presale and full transparency on allocation.
  1. Choose the token you like
  2. Buy the token on the selected chain
  3. Sell at any time to lock in your profits or losses
  4. When enough people buy, it reaches a market cap of $69k
  5. $12k of liquidity is then deposited on UNISWAP and burned
